misc: Struggles with his gender identity, occasionally participating in events under his female alter-ego, "Eva".
biography: Marcus, a familiar face at Kurk Golf, brings a unique dimension to the greens. While his competitors know him as a calculating strategist on the course, few are aware of his deeply personal journey with gender identity.

A veteran of the Hector Trophée, with participation in all twelve previous events, Marcus is still searching for his first victory at the tournament. Although the coveted Hector Trophée and the individual Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his dedication remains unwavering. In fact, we expect to see him competing again in Hector Trophée 2026.

Off the course, Marcus occasionally embraces his alter ego, 'Eva', even participating in select events under this identity. This duality adds an intriguing layer to Marcus's persona, reflecting a complexity rarely seen in the world of professional golf. Whether as Marcus or Eva, their passion for the game shines brightly.
